name: jingyi-reservation-system
description: 敬一书院功能房预约管理系统

scripts.check:all: npm run check:network && npm run check:test-data && npm run check:student-loop && npm run check:mobile && npm run check:admin-miniapp && npm run check:miniapp-ui && npm run check:request-refresh && npm run check:security
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
scripts.db:init: mysql -u root -p < server/sql/schema.sql && mysql -u root -p < server/sql/seed.sql
